zh.lifeSummary: 當Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x於大約1155年出生在威爾士福林爾時，她的父親Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain25歲，母親Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd207歲。她和Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。她去世在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x于大约1155年出生在威尔士福林爾时，她的父亲Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain25岁，母亲Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd207岁。她和Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。她去世在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: Gwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan) and Irish: variant of   Gwin   or   Gwynne  .

variants.name: Gwin
meanings: Welsh: from gwyn ‘fair, white’, also sometimes ‘white-headed; favorite’. This word was widely used as a personal name in the Middle Ages. It may also be a nickname for a person with fair hair or a noticeably pale complexion. See also Winn .

nameMeanings.name: Annes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

variants.name: Annice
meanings: Variant spelling of Annis , based on the numerous women's names ending in -ice.

variants.name: Annys
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x was born about 1155, in Flintshire, Wales, her father, Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd, was 207. She had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi. She died in Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x est née environ 1155, à Flintshire, Galles, son père, Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd, avait 207 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi. Elle est décédée à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x um 1155 in Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd 207. Sie hatte mit Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x è nata il circa 1155 nel Flintshire, Galles, sua padre, Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd, aveva 207 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi. Morì nel Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" xが約1155年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywainは25歳，母Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffuddは207歳であった。彼女はRichard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigiとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女はウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x(이)가 대략 1155년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd(은)는 207세였다. 그녀는 Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd, tinha 207 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi. Ela faleceu em Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x родилась около 1155 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd, 207. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi. Она умерла в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x nació aproximadamente 1155, en Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Gwyn Ddistain ap Ednywain, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Gwyn ap Gruffudd, tenía 207 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi. Murió en Gales.
